title: Passing the Training Ground
prompt: Tracking shot from behind. The Former Player walks slowly past an old football training ground at dusk. He wears a dark simple coat and uses a medical cane. Empty goalposts, worn grass, quiet academy buildings, and a lonely fence line surround him. Muted dusty colors, melancholic cinematic realism, soft 35mm film grain, lonely atmosphere.
negative_prompt: American football, basketball, modern stadium crowd, celebration, advertisement, neon, glossy sports poster, cartoon, anime, text, watermark, gore, wooden cane
motion_hint: Slow tracking camera following from behind, steady walking pace with a noticeable limp, light wind rustling the grass across the empty field.

title: Academy Memory
prompt: A young gifted football academy player training alone on the same field years earlier. He is small in frame with a football at his feet, wearing a simple dusty academy kit. Empty goal in the background. Warm evening light. Faded memory aesthetic. Muted warm colors, cinematic realism, 35mm film grain.
negative_prompt: American football helmet, basketball, professional superstar pose, crowd celebration, modern advertisement, cartoon, anime, neon, text, watermark
motion_hint: Slow dolly-in camera drift, subtle cinematic slow-motion, grass moving lightly in the wind.

title: The Trophy Corridor
lyric: Mama, take this badge from me.
prompt: The Former Player, walking with a medical cane, moves through a quiet football academy corridor, passing in front of a glass trophy shelf. Old medals, cups, team photographs, and academy awards reflect on the glass beside him. Cinematic low light, muted cold teal colors, melancholic realism, soft film grain.
negative_prompt: police badge, sheriff badge, military medals, glossy commercial display, happy sports celebration, modern neon lighting, cartoon, anime, text, watermark, wooden cane
motion_hint: Slow sideways tracking shot keeping pace with his limp, trophy reflections sliding dynamically across the glass surface.

title: People in the Corridor
prompt: The Former Player meets an older coach and a young boy in a plain academy corridor. No trophies in this hallway. They stand facing each other politely but with emotional distance. The Former Player leans slightly on his medical walking stick. Realistic body language, melancholic cinematic lighting, cold steel greys.
negative_prompt: group celebration, smiling advertisement, party, handshake business meeting, police uniform, cartoon, anime, exaggerated emotion, text, watermark
motion_hint: Static camera, small subtle nods, restrained and slow physical greeting, heavy silence in the micro-movements.

title: Stadium Lights Shut Down
prompt: An empty football stadium training field at nightfall. Large stadium floodlights are shutting down. The Former Player stands as a dark silhouette leaning on a medical cane near the edge of the pitch. The field is swallowed by darkness. Moody cinematic realism, deep shadows, muted blue-black tones, heavy film grain.
negative_prompt: bright colorful match, crowd, celebration, horror monster, neon cyberpunk, cartoon, anime, text, watermark
motion_hint: Static wide shot,  floodlight turns off then slow fade of the environment into deep shadow.

title: Car Window
lyric: Feels like I'm knockin' on Heaven's door.
prompt: Close-up of The Former Player sitting silently in the back seat of a moving car at night, looking outside through the rain-streaked window. Passing city lights blur across the glass, illuminating his tired face intermittently. Cinematic realism, deep shadows, amber and teal streetlights, 35mm film grain.
negative_prompt: luxury car advertisement, smiling driver, angels, clouds, fantasy heaven, neon cyberpunk, cartoon, anime, text, watermark
motion_hint: Dynamic shifting light patterns on his face from passing streetlights, subtle car vibrations, slow melancholic gaze.

title: Arriving at the Doorstep
prompt: The Former Player, viewed from behind, stands before a worn wooden door in a dim apartment hallway at night. He leans on his medical walking stick, standing still and hesitant. Overhead flickering incandescent hallway light, quiet loneliness, realistic domestic setting, melancholic film grain.
negative_prompt: angels, fantasy portal, horror doorway, luxury mansion, neon, cartoon, anime, text, watermark
motion_hint: Slow push-in camera movement toward his back, minimal character movement showing physical hesitation.

title: Inside the Home
prompt: The Former Player sits alone on a sofa in his quiet, dim apartment. A medical walking stick leans against the sofa. Old football shoes and a folded jersey sit on the floor nearby. He stares forward blankly. Cinematic domestic realism, muted cold colors, soft shadows, heavy film grain.
negative_prompt: happy family scene, luxury apartment, bright colorful room, angels, sports celebration, cartoon, anime, text, watermark, wooden cane
motion_hint: Camera is perfectly still, the character sits heavily, breathing slowly, staring into the middle distance.

title: War Memory Begins
prompt: A surreal, poetic double-exposure memory. A ruined street subtly overlaps with the grass of a football field. Thick dust and smoke drift slowly across the frame. Distant blurred silhouettes run in panic. No graphic violence, highly symbolic and restrained. Muted gray, ash, and brown colors, heavy 35mm film grain.
negative_prompt: graphic violence, gore, blood, visible injuries, action movie explosions, propaganda poster, soldiers shooting, cartoon, anime, text, watermark
motion_hint: Slow horizontal drift of smoke, surreal cross-fade fading in and out, slow-motion running silhouettes in the deep background.

title: Waking From Memory
lyric: Mama put my guns in the ground.
prompt: The Former Player awake on his dim apartment sofa,. He frantically reaches down to the floor for his missing medical cane but cannot reach it. His face shows sudden vulnerability. Cinematic domestic realism, muted colors, soft shadows, film grain.
negative_prompt: literal guns, weapons, shooting, action scene, gore, graphic injury, melodrama, cartoon, anime, bright sports advertisement, text, watermark
motion_hint: wakes up slowly, reaching motion toward the floor and falling down, slight handheld camera shake reflecting his internal state.

title: Anger at the Body
prompt: Intimate close-up of The Former Player sitting forward on the sofa. He grips his injured leg in frustration, his face contorted with suppressed grief and unshed tears. A medical cane and old football boots lie on the carpet nearby. Cinematic realism, muted colors, harsh side lighting emphasizing his tired features, film grain.

title: The Black Cloud
lyric: That cold black cloud is comin' down.
prompt: The Former Player leans back heavily into the sofa, tilting his head to look up at the ceiling. The natural light from the window subtly fades, plunging the room into deeper shadow. His face looks exhausted and numb. Minimal domestic interior, deep shadows, muted blue-black tones, cinematic realism, film grain.

title: Ceiling as Threshold
lyric: Feels like I'm knockin' on Heaven's door.
prompt: First-person POV shot looking directly straight up at a plain, dimly lit apartment ceiling. A simple ceiling lamp sits in the center. The Former Player's head is visible at the very bottom edge of the frame, staring upward. Cinematic domestic realism, stark framing, muted colors, soft film grain.

title: Loved Ones Remembered
prompt: A warm, faded memory of the young academy player surrounded by proud parents and an older coach on a dusty football field at sunset. They are smiling warmly, sharing a quiet, intimate moment. Earthy brown and amber tones, vintage aesthetic, cinematic realism, heavy film grain.

title: First Goal
prompt: The young academy football player watches in awe as a dusty football rolls across the white line of an empty net. He turns around, his face lighting up with pure, disbelieving joy. Modest dirt training field, golden hour lighting, cinematic realism, 35mm film grain.

title: First Trophy
prompt: The young football academy player holding a small, modest metal trophy tightly with both hands, standing proudly. Soft, faded memory aesthetic. Warm, intimate lighting, earthy tones, soft film grain, realistic youth academy atmosphere.

title: Memory Returns to the Room
prompt: The Former Player sits on the sofa in the dim room, but his expression has softened. He looks tired but at peace. The small metal trophy from his youth sits on a table in the foreground. Old football shoes on the floor. Cinematic domestic realism, muted but slightly warmer colors, film grain.

title: The New Field
prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot. The Former Player stands at the edge of a green football field in soft daylight, leaning on his medical walking stick. In the background, out of focus, players in training kits run after a ball on the pitch. Calm, serious atmosphere. Cinematic realism, natural light, muted hopeful colors, soft film grain.

title: Teaching the Game
prompt: The Former Player stands holding a marker in front of a white tactics board on a grass field, leaning on his medical cane. Five teammates sit on the grass looking up at him attentively. Restrained hopeful mood, cinematic realism, soft daylight, muted greens and greys, 35mm film grain.

title: The Door Becomes the Field
prompt: A sweeping bird's-eye view looking down at a football field at sunset. The Former Player stands as a small, calm silhouette on the touchline, leaning on his cane. In the center of the field, a group of players run through a practice match. The white goal frame casts long shadows. Poetic cinematic realism, muted golden light, soft film grain, quiet resolution.

motion_hint: High-angle slow drone drift moving gently over the field, capturing players running below and the long sunset shadows stretching across the grass.
